---
title: "Audit Analytics"
page-layout: article
---

# Audit Analytics

## Description

Database of corporate disclosures, audit information, accounting practices, regulatory filings, and compliance activity. Supports research in accounting, corporate governance, financial reporting, and regulation.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events, Data Platform
- **Access model:** WRDS Account Required, Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, News & Current Events, Data Platform

## Access notes

Available via WRDS or the Audit Analytics website. Both options require users to register for an account with a valid Yale email address.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://search.library.yale.edu/catalog/16525201)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
